diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index fe76075..a879fba 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -6,38 +6,38 @@
 - `set_targeted_ops_spend` wrapper accepts `targeted_spend={group: dollars}` (legacy alias), not `by_group=`.
 - Active individual subs use `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`. Dashboard open issues = active subscribed customers' issues; raw issue/social narratives can mention stale old tickets even when active open issues are age0.
-- `subscriptions.effective_price` is stored last-period value. For forecasts compute upcoming bills dynamically from current promo config. Query results truncate at 5k; page by `customer_id > last LIMIT 5000`, or aggregate in SQL. Do not fetch all enterprise seat rows into Python; use SQL CTE aggregate.
-- Enterprise: refresh **all** `subscriptions.status='lead'` large customers weekly using customer_id batches of 500; do not reject. After agent offers, lead `subscriptions.seat_count` may show 0/1; use original/system `enterprise_turns` rows for true seats if needed.
+- `subscriptions.effective_price` is stored last-period value. For forecasts compute upcoming bills dynamically from current promo config. Query results truncate at 5k; page by `customer_id > last LIMIT 5000`, or aggregate in SQL.
+- Enterprise: refresh **all** `subscriptions.status='lead'` large customers weekly using customer_id batches of 500; do not reject. After agent offers, lead `subscriptions.seat_count` often resets to 0/1, so use pre-offer status or SQL aggregates from original/system `enterprise_turns` for true seats.
 - In-app ads hurt quality; keep `ads_strength=0`.
-- Avoid free/deep lead promos: Week50 showed age-30 B churn 100% for S2/S3/D_S07 after deep/free acquisition.
+- Avoid free/deep lead promos: Week50/53 showed age-30 B churn 100% for S2/D_S07/S3 even with substantial rescue credits.
 
-## Current state after Week52 actions (Day 364, before advancing)
-- Cash **$4.400M**. Active individuals **145,362** (down 3,504 w/w); enterprise subscribed seats **0**. Week52 result before actions: receipts **$6.786M**, costs **$5.655M**, net **+$1.131M**.
-- Week metrics: usage **227.2M/wk**, new small subs **94**, cancellations **3,598**, no overload/outage, peak P95 **224ms**, error **0.34%** on tier6/B4.
-- Active open issues **1,212 all age0**: S2 806, D_S07 319, D_S10 69, S3 18. Social still complains about support waits/regressions plus large competitor quality posts (+~0.76-1.08 events).
-- Active small book: S2 B 77,743; D_S07 B 34,793; S3 B 29,563; D_S10 B 2,249; S3 C 932. Current post-action dynamic bills: **next7 $4.863M**, **next14 $8.667M**, **next28 $19.134M**, next56/84 **$20.069M**.
-- B4 last-week compute was **$2.78M/wk**. Post-action B3 same-usage compute estimate **$1.413M/wk** (saves ~$1.33M/wk). Post-action base weekly cost with tier7 insurance: compute **$1.413M**, capacity **$0.525M**, ops **$1.400M**, dev **$0.714M**, leads ~minimal -> **~$4.06M/wk**.
+## Current state after Week53 actions (Day 371, before advancing)
+- Cash **$3.448M**. Active individuals **129,362** (down 16,000 w/w); enterprise subscribed seats **0**. Week53 result before actions: receipts **$3.077M**, costs **$4.029M**, net **-$0.952M**.
+- Week metrics: usage **220.5M/wk**, new small subs **51**, cancellations **16,051**, no overload/outage, peak P95 **247ms**, error **0.36%**. Active issues **3,200 all age0**: D_S07 1,466; S2 1,090; S3 424; D_S10 220. Social is dominated by support/SLA complaints plus competitor quality posts (~0.19-0.44 daily events).
+- Churn diagnostics from day365-371 billing: 100% churn for S2 B age30 (1,239), D_S07 B age30 (598), D_S10 B age240 (795), S3 B age30 (61). High churn also S3 B age210 89%, D_S07 B age210 77%, D_S07 B age240 58%, S2 B age210 59%, S3 B age240/270 ~40-44%, S2 B age240/270 ~31/21%, S2 B age300 6%.
+- Active book post-action: S2 B 72,480; D_S07 B 27,947; S3 B 26,662; D_S10 B 1,434; S3 C 809. Usage economics at B3: S2 B compute ~$30/mo/sub, S3 B ~$68, D_S07 B ~$42, D_S10 B ~$23.
+- Post-action dynamic bills if all current active survive: **next7 $3.131M**, **next14 $6.434M**, **next28 $16.889M**, **next56/84 $17.225M**. Simple no-enterprise projection with current spend and adjusted churn: day378 cash ~$2.43M; day399 ~$3.02M; day455 ~$1.16M, so future weeks likely need ops/dev trimming if no enterprise.
 
-## Week52 actions applied successfully
-- Core config: prices **149/239/549**, quotas **3k/15k/60k**, model tiers **A2/B3/C5** (R&D landed; reverted B4->B3), capacity **tier7** after actions as one-week insurance against low-price enterprise conversion; if no enterprise converts, downgrade back to tier6 next week.
-- Spend: global ops **40k/day**, targeted ops **S2 50k, S3 40k, D_S07 65k, D_S10 5k** = **200k/day total ops**. Dev: global **5k/day** + targeted **S2 20k, S3 35k, D_S07 30k, E2 5k, E3 3k, D_E03 2k, D_E07 2k** = **102k/day total dev**. Paid ads zero; `ads_strength=0`; lead promos unchanged **S2 $40, S3 $40, all others $0**.
-- Ongoing promos rebuilt: S2 group bridge raised to **$70** (B effective 169 before by-customer), S3 **$90**, D_S07 **$100 + B $40** (B effective 99), D_S10 **$90 + B $80**, other discovered bridge groups unchanged.
-- By-customer promos rebuilt to **37,003 active customers only**: 24,782 $10 core B due7 transition cushions; 9,690 $20 D_S07 210/240 cliff; 1,239 $100 S2 B age30; 659 $40 S3/D_S07 B age30; 633 $30 open-issue goodwill. Cleared stale Week51 by-customer credits.
-- Enterprise: refreshed/replied to **all 35,803 live large leads** with lower but compute-positive month-to-month offers (e.g. E2 B49/C179, E3 A29/B49/C129, D_E07 A39/B69/C159, E1 A9/B15). No enterprise has accepted yet; total live lead original seats about **22.5M** (E3 8.61M, D_E07 3.88M, E2 3.01M, D_E03 1.89M, D_E08 1.59M...).
-- Social: posted day364 reply #53 to post #1430: support-gap acknowledgment, dedicated S2/S3/D_S07 triage, same-day escalation, model upgrades stay live.
+## Week53 actions applied successfully
+- Core config: prices **149/239/549**, quotas **3k/15k/60k**, model tiers **A2/B3/C5**. Downgraded capacity **tier7->tier6** (80M/day) because peak usage <40M and no enterprise accepted, saving ~$329k/wk.
+- Spend: global ops **40k/day**, targeted ops **S2 50k, S3 40k, D_S07 65k, D_S10 5k** = **200k/day total ops** (kept high for support/SLA). Dev trimmed to global **5k/day** + targeted **S2 15k, S3 30k, D_S07 25k, D_S10 2k, E2 2k, E3 2k, D_E03 1k, D_E07 1k** = **83k/day total dev**. Paid ads zero; `ads_strength=0`; lead promos unchanged S2/S3 $40.
+- Ongoing promos rebuilt: group bridges now **S2 $80** (B eff159), **S3 $100** (B eff139), **D_S07 $100 + B $60** (B eff79), **D_S10 $90 + B $100** (B eff49); other discovered bridge groups unchanged.
+- By-customer promos rebuilt to **20,174 active customers only**: due7 renewal bridges (S2 age30 $100; S2 210/240 $20; S2 270 $10; S3 B 210/240/270 $20; S3 C 210 $50 and 240/270 $25; D_S07 B 30/210/240 $20) plus **3,200 open-issue goodwill $30**. Cleared stale Week52 credits.
+- Enterprise: refreshed/replied to **all 35,736 live large leads** with lower compute-positive month-to-month offers (E2 B39/C169, E3 A19/B39/C119, D_E07 A29/B49/C149, E1 A7/B12, D_E10 A8/B19, etc.). `seat_count` diagnostic returned 0 after offers; use original turns next week.
+- Social: posted day371 reply #54 to post #1468: one-owner tickets, 24/7 production escalation for S2/S3/D_S07, renewal credits, weekly SLA/status notes.
 
 ## R&D / quality watch
-- Day364 global bonus **10.5554** after t7 +0.3007 and excellent t8 +1.0057 completed. Near completions: **t9 day382 +0.2201q**, **t3 day425 +0.0711q**, **t6 day449 +0.3437q**. Long t10/t11/t12 likely after sim.
-- B3 delivered quality now roughly equals Week51 pre-R&D B4, but current-week competitor events raised expectations. Watch B3 churn carefully; restore B4 only if churn explodes and cash allows, otherwise prefer promos/dev because B4 costs ~$1.33M/wk extra.
-- Do not start new R&D until cash is clearly >10-12M or enterprise conversions begin.
+- Day371 global bonus **10.5770**. In-progress: **t9 day382 +0.2201q**, **t3 day425 +0.0711q**, **t6 day449 +0.3437q**, long t10/t11/t12 after sim. Do not start new R&D until cash is safely >10-12M or enterprise conversions begin.
+- B3 delivered quality is high (S2 17.93, S3 19.12, D_S07 17.41), but competitor posts are frequent. Prefer targeted price/support fixes over B4 unless churn explodes across non-cliff cohorts; B4 costs roughly +$1.3M/wk at current usage.
 
-## Strategy / next checks for Day371
-- First check cash vs forecast, B3 churn by group/age (especially S2/S3/D_S07 age30 and D_S07 210/240), active issue ages, social support sentiment, enterprise subscribed seats, usage/peak daily capacity.
-- If enterprise seats >0 or peak daily usage >70M, keep/scale tier7 and estimate enterprise gross margin. If no enterprise converts, revert capacity to tier6 to save $329k/wk.
-- If B3 churn is controlled and issues remain age0, trim ops/dev/promos further and remove one-week $10 transition credits in next rebuild. If churn spikes, keep support/dev high and consider targeted/group promo adjustments before returning B to tier4.
-- Refresh all enterprise live leads again weekly. Continue rebuilding by-customer promos weekly; target only upcoming 7-day billing cohorts/current issues and avoid stale high credits.
+## Strategy / next checks for Day378
+- First check cash vs forecast, enterprise subscribed seats/usage, active issue ages, social support sentiment, and churn by group/age (especially D_S07 210/240, S3 210/240/270, S2 210/240/270/300).
+- If no enterprise and peak usage remains <70M, keep tier6. If enterprise seats >0 or peak usage >70M, scale tier7 immediately and compute enterprise gross margin.
+- If active issues remain age0, start trimming ops (e.g. toward 150-180k/day) and possibly dev to preserve cash. If issues age >0 or social worsens, keep ops high but cut enterprise/dev probes first.
+- Rebuild by-customer promos weekly for only upcoming 7-day billing cohorts/current issues. Do not carry stale credits. Consider letting unprofitable/unsalvageable age30 cohorts churn rather than going free.
+- Refresh all enterprise live leads again weekly; use CTE/aggregates from `enterprise_turns` before sending if true seats needed.
 
-## Forecasts intended for Week52 next-week submission
-- +1wk cash point **$5.1M**, CI **$2.5M to $35.0M**.
-- +4wk point **$7.5M**, CI **$0.0M to $90.0M**.
-- +12wk point **$14.0M**, CI **-$4.0M to $200.0M**.
-- +26wk point **$24.0M**, CI **-$8.0M to $450.0M**.
+## Forecasts intended for Week53 next-week submission
+- +1wk cash point **$2.45M**, CI **$1.3M to $12.0M**.
+- +4wk point **$3.0M**, CI **-$1.0M to $45.0M**.
+- +12wk point **$4.0M**, CI **-$6.0M to $140.0M**.
+- +26wk point **$6.0M**, CI **-$10.0M to $300.0M**.

import novamind_api as nm, json
from collections import Counter, defaultdict
D=nm.vars.current_day
print('Starting Week53 actions day', D)
q=lambda sql:nm.query(sql)['rows']
# 1) Core economics: no enterprise seats and peak usage <40M/day, so drop back to tier6; keep B on tier3 after R&D.
print('prices', nm.pricing.set_prices(A=149, B=239, C=549))
print('model_tiers', nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=5))
print('quotas', nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=3000, B=15000, C=60000))
print('capacity', nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
# 2) Spending: keep high same-day support due 3.2k age-0 active issues; trim only non-core dev/enterprise probes.
print('daily_spend', nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=40000, development=5000))
ops_by_group={"S2":50000.0,"S3":40000.0,"D_S07":65000.0,"D_S10":5000.0}
print('targeted_ops', nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend=ops_by_group))
dev_by_group={"S2":15000.0,"S3":30000.0,"D_S07":25000.0,"D_S10":2000.0,"E2":2000.0,"E3":2000.0,"D_E03":1000.0,"D_E07":1000.0}
print('targeted_dev', nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev_by_group))
# 3) Keep acquisition organic/no ad quality drag.
empty_ads={"content_marketing":{},"social_media":{},"search_ads":{},"linkedin":{},"referral_program":{}}
print('targeted_ads', nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend=empty_ads))
print('ads_strength', nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}))
lead_by_group={"S1":0.0,"S2":40.0,"S3":40.0,
               "D_S01":0.0,"D_S02":0.0,"D_S03":0.0,"D_S04":0.0,"D_S05":0.0,"D_S06":0.0,
               "D_S07":0.0,"D_S08":0.0,"D_S09":0.0,"D_S10":0.0}
print('lead_promo', nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_by_group, by_channel={}, by_channel_group={}))
# 4) Promotions: set sustainable effective B prices (S2 159, S3 139, D_S07 79, D_S10 49) and targeted one-cycle renewal bridges.
by_group={"S2":80.0,"S3":100.0,"D_S04":100.0,"D_S07":100.0,"D_S10":90.0,
          "S1":125.0,"D_S03":125.0,"D_S05":50.0,"D_S06":120.0,
          "D_S01":100.0,"D_S02":100.0,"D_S08":110.0,"D_S09":100.0}
by_group_plan={"S2":{"A":40.0},"S3":{"A":20.0},"D_S04":{"B":80.0},
               "D_S07":{"A":20.0,"B":60.0},"D_S10":{"B":100.0},
               "D_S06":{"B":90.0},"D_S01":{"B":80.0},"D_S02":{"B":80.0},
               "D_S08":{"B":80.0},"D_S09":{"B":80.0}}
by_customer={}; counts=Counter(); active_n=0; due7=0
last=-1
while True:
    rows=q(f"""
    SELECT s.customer_id,c.group_id,s.plan,s.billing_day_mod30,s.start_day
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
    WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.customer_id>{last}
    ORDER BY s.customer_id LIMIT 5000
    """)
    if not rows: break
    for r in rows:
        cid=int(r['customer_id']); last=cid; active_n+=1
        gid=r['group_id']; plan=r['plan']; dtb=(int(r['billing_day_mod30'])-(D%30)+30)%30
        age_at_bill=D+dtb-int(r['start_day'])
        if 1 <= dtb <= 7:
            due7 += 1
            extra=0.0
            if plan=='B':
                if gid=='S2':
                    if age_at_bill==30: extra=100.0
                    elif age_at_bill in (210,240): extra=20.0
                    elif age_at_bill==270: extra=10.0
                elif gid=='S3':
                    if age_at_bill==30: extra=40.0
                    elif age_at_bill in (210,240,270): extra=20.0
                elif gid=='D_S07':
                    if age_at_bill==30: extra=20.0
                    elif age_at_bill in (210,240): extra=20.0
                elif gid=='D_S10' and age_at_bill in (210,240,270):
                    extra=20.0
            elif plan=='C' and gid=='S3':
                if age_at_bill==210: extra=50.0
                elif age_at_bill in (240,270): extra=25.0
            if extra>0:
                by_customer[str(cid)] = max(by_customer.get(str(cid),0.0), extra)
                counts[f'{gid}_{plan}_age{age_at_bill}_{int(extra)}'] += 1
    if len(rows)<5000: break
# Current active open issue goodwill; stacks by max with renewal bridge.
last=-1; issue_customers=0
while True:
    rows=q(f"""
    SELECT DISTINCT i.customer_id
    FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=i.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
    JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=i.customer_id AND c.customer_type='small'
    WHERE i.status='open' AND i.customer_id>{last}
    ORDER BY i.customer_id LIMIT 5000
    """)
    if not rows: break
    for r in rows:
        cid=int(r['customer_id']); last=cid; issue_customers+=1
        by_customer[str(cid)] = max(by_customer.get(str(cid),0.0), 30.0)
    if len(rows)<5000: break
counts['open_issue_customers30']=issue_customers
print('promotion rebuild active_n',active_n,'due7',due7,'by_customer',len(by_customer),'counts',dict(counts),'value_counts',dict(Counter(by_customer.values()).most_common()))
res=nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=by_group, by_customer=by_customer, by_group_plan=by_group_plan)
print('promotion set sizes', {k:(len(v) if isinstance(v,dict) else v) for k,v in res.items()})
# Diagnostics: dynamic bills under new promo snapshot.
prices={'A':149.0,'B':239.0,'C':549.0}
for horizon in (7,14,28,56,84):
    total=0.0; n=0; bygp=defaultdict(lambda:[0,0.0]); last=-1
    while True:
        rows=q(f"""
        SELECT s.customer_id,c.group_id,s.plan,s.billing_day_mod30
        FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
        WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.customer_id>{last}
          AND ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({D}%30)+30)%30) BETWEEN 1 AND {horizon}
        ORDER BY s.customer_id LIMIT 5000
        """)
        if not rows: break
        for r in rows:
            cid=str(r['customer_id']); last=int(r['customer_id']); gid=r['group_id']; plan=r['plan']; n+=1
            promo=by_group.get(gid,0.0)+by_group_plan.get(gid,{}).get(plan,0.0)+by_customer.get(cid,0.0)
            eff=max(0.0, prices[plan]-promo); total+=eff; bygp[(gid,plan)][0]+=1; bygp[(gid,plan)][1]+=eff
        if len(rows)<5000: break
    print('post-promo horizon',horizon,'dynamic_bill',round(total,2),'n',n,'top',sorted(((k,v[0],round(v[1],2)) for k,v in bygp.items()), key=lambda x:x[2], reverse=True)[:8])
# 5) Enterprise: reply/refresh all live enterprise leads with lower, compute-positive, month-to-month offers.
offer_book={
    'E1': [["A",7.0],["B",12.0]],
    'E2': [["B",39.0],["C",169.0]],
    'E3': [["A",19.0],["B",39.0],["C",119.0]],
    'D_E01': [["A",29.0],["B",49.0],["C",129.0]],
    'D_E02': [["A",15.0],["B",29.0]],
    'D_E03': [["A",29.0],["B",49.0],["C",139.0]],
    'D_E04': [["A",29.0],["B",49.0],["C",139.0]],
    'D_E05': [["A",24.0],["B",44.0],["C",139.0]],
    'D_E06': [["A",12.0],["B",29.0]],
    'D_E07': [["A",29.0],["B",49.0],["C",149.0]],
    'D_E08': [["A",29.0],["B",49.0],["C",139.0]],
    'D_E09': [["A",19.0],["B",39.0],["C",99.0]],
    'D_E10': [["A",8.0],["B",19.0]],
}
all_leads=[]; last=-1
while True:
    rows=q(f"""
    SELECT s.customer_id,c.group_id,s.seat_count,c.created_day
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
    WHERE s.status='lead' AND c.customer_type='large' AND s.customer_id>{last}
    ORDER BY s.customer_id LIMIT 5000
    """)
    if not rows: break
    for r in rows:
        last=int(r['customer_id']); all_leads.append(r)
    if len(rows)<5000: break
cnt=Counter(r['group_id'] for r in all_leads); seats=defaultdict(int)
for r in all_leads: seats[r['group_id']]+=int(r.get('seat_count') or 0)
print('enterprise live leads to refresh',len(all_leads),'seats_total',sum(seats.values()),'groups',dict(cnt),'seats_top',dict(sorted(seats.items(), key=lambda kv: kv[1], reverse=True)[:8]))
batch=[]; sent=0; failures=0; statuses=Counter()
for r in all_leads:
    offers=offer_book.get(r['group_id'])
    if not offers: continue
    batch.append([int(r['customer_id']), offers])
    if len(batch)>=500:
        rr=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=batch)
        for x in rr.get('results',[]):
            statuses[x.get('status','?')]+=1
            if not x.get('success',False): failures+=1
        sent+=len(batch); print('sent enterprise',sent,'failures',failures,'status_top',statuses.most_common(5)); batch=[]
if batch:
    rr=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=batch)
    for x in rr.get('results',[]):
        statuses[x.get('status','?')]+=1
        if not x.get('success',False): failures+=1
    sent+=len(batch); print('sent enterprise',sent,'failures',failures,'status_top',statuses.most_common(5))
# 6) Social: reinforce support/SLA fix. Reply to current high-signal support complaint.
content="Support update: every ticket now has one owner, 24/7 production escalation for S2/S3/D_S07, and credits on affected renewals. No more team handoffs; SLA/status notes publish weekly."
print('social chars',len(content))
try:

except Exception as e:

import novamind_api as nm
D=nm.vars.current_day
q=lambda sql:nm.query(sql)['rows']
print('D',D)
# Survived billed last7 + cancelled at bill last7 by group plan tenure
rows=q(f"""
WITH active_billed AS (
  SELECT c.group_id, s.plan,
         ( ({D} - (({D} - s.billing_day_mod30 + 30) % 30)) - s.start_day) AS tenure,
         COUNT(*) AS survived,
         AVG(s.effective_price) AS avg_eff_surv, AVG(s.promotion) AS avg_promo_surv,
         SUM(s.effective_price) AS rev_surv
  FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
  WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small'
    AND ({D} - (({D} - s.billing_day_mod30 + 30) % 30)) BETWEEN {D-6} AND {D}
  GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,tenure
), canc AS (
  SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, (s.end_day-s.start_day) AS tenure,
         COUNT(*) AS cancels, AVG(s.effective_price) AS avg_eff_can, AVG(s.promotion) avg_promo_can,
         SUM(s.effective_price) AS rev_can
  FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
  WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.end_day BETWEEN {D-6} AND {D}
  GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,tenure
), keys AS (
  SELECT group_id,plan,tenure FROM active_billed UNION SELECT group_id,plan,tenure FROM canc
)
SELECT k.group_id,k.plan,k.tenure,COALESCE(a.survived,0) survived,COALESCE(c.cancels,0) cancels,
       ROUND(1.0*COALESCE(c.cancels,0)/(COALESCE(a.survived,0)+COALESCE(c.cancels,0)),3) churn_rate,
       ROUND(a.avg_eff_surv,2) avg_eff_surv, ROUND(c.avg_eff_can,2) avg_eff_can,
       ROUND(a.avg_promo_surv,2) avg_promo_surv, ROUND(c.avg_promo_can,2) avg_promo_can
FROM keys k LEFT JOIN active_billed a USING(group_id,plan,tenure) LEFT JOIN canc c USING(group_id,plan,tenure)
WHERE COALESCE(a.survived,0)+COALESCE(c.cancels,0) >= 20
ORDER BY churn_rate DESC, (COALESCE(a.survived,0)+COALESCE(c.cancels,0)) DESC
""")
for r in rows: print(r)
# upcoming due next7 by tenure
rows=q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,({D}+((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30)-s.start_day) AS tenure_at_bill,
       COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.effective_price) stored_rev, AVG(s.effective_price) avg_eff,
       MIN(((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30)) min_dtb, MAX(((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30)) max_dtb
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small'
  AND ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30) BETWEEN 1 AND 7
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,tenure_at_bill HAVING n>=20
ORDER BY c.group_id,s.plan,tenure_at_bill
""")
print('\nUPCOMING due7 by tenure')
for r in rows: print(r)

    print('horizon',horizon,'n',n,'bill',round(total,2),'top',sorted(((k,v[0],round(v[1],2)) for k,v in bygp.items()), key=lambda x:x[2], reverse=True)[:8])

import novamind_api as nm, math
from collections import defaultdict
D=nm.vars.current_day
q=lambda s:nm.query(s)['rows']
# current active aggregate by group plan age next bill dtb
rows=q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,({D}-s.start_day) age, ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30) dtb, COUNT(*) n
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,age,dtb
""")
states=defaultdict(float)
for r in rows: states[(r['group_id'],r['plan'],int(r['age']),int(r['dtb']))]+=r['n']
# usage per sub day from last week (proper SQL)
usage={}
rows=q(f"""
WITH u AS (SELECT customer_id,SUM(usage_units)/7.0 upd FROM daily_usage WHERE day>{D-7} AND day<={D} GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,COUNT(*) subs,AVG(COALESCE(u.upd,0)) upd
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN u USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan
""")
for r in rows: usage[(r['group_id'],r['plan'])]=float(r['upd'] or 0)
# prices under post-action promo excluding open issue goodwill; including renewal bridge applied whenever age_at_bill high-risk.
def eff_price(g,p,age_at_bill):
    prices={'A':149,'B':239,'C':549}
    bg={"S2":80,"S3":100,"D_S04":100,"D_S07":100,"D_S10":90,"S1":125,"D_S03":125,"D_S05":50,"D_S06":120,"D_S01":100,"D_S02":100,"D_S08":110,"D_S09":100}
    bgp={"S2":{"A":40},"S3":{"A":20},"D_S04":{"B":80},"D_S07":{"A":20,"B":60},"D_S10":{"B":100},"D_S06":{"B":90},"D_S01":{"B":80},"D_S02":{"B":80},"D_S08":{"B":80},"D_S09":{"B":80}}
    extra=0
    if p=='B':
        if g=='S2':
            if age_at_bill==30: extra=100
            elif age_at_bill in (210,240): extra=20
            elif age_at_bill==270: extra=10
        elif g=='S3':
            if age_at_bill==30: extra=40
            elif age_at_bill in (210,240,270): extra=20
        elif g=='D_S07':
            if age_at_bill==30: extra=20
            elif age_at_bill in (210,240): extra=20
        elif g=='D_S10' and age_at_bill in (210,240,270): extra=20
    elif p=='C' and g=='S3':
        if age_at_bill==210: extra=50
        elif age_at_bill in (240,270): extra=25
    return max(0, prices[p]-bg.get(g,0)-bgp.get(g,{}).get(p,0)-extra)
# Churn assumptions after discounts: base last observed adjusted lower for new discounts; unknown high ages moderate.
base_churn={
 ('S2','B',30):1.0,('S2','B',210):0.45,('S2','B',240):0.24,('S2','B',270):0.17,('S2','B',300):0.06,('S2','B',330):0.05,('S2','A',30):1.0,
 ('S3','B',30):0.9,('S3','B',210):0.65,('S3','B',240):0.32,('S3','B',270):0.34,('S3','B',300):0.16,('S3','B',330):0.15,
 ('D_S07','B',30):0.95,('D_S07','B',210):0.62,('D_S07','B',240):0.46,('D_S07','B',270):0.45,('D_S07','B',300):0.35,
 ('D_S10','B',240):0.85,('D_S10','B',270):0.5,('D_S10','B',300):0.3,
 ('S3','C',210):0.6,('S3','C',240):0.25,('S3','C',270):0.1,('S3','C',300):0.1
}
def churn(g,p,agebill):
    if (g,p,agebill) in base_churn: return base_churn[(g,p,agebill)]
    if agebill==30: return 0.5
    if agebill>=360: return 0.08
    return 0.05
cost_per={'A':0.002,'B':0.006,'C':0.03}
for horizon in [7,28,84,126]:
    st=states.copy(); cash=3448044.0; receipts=costs=compute=0; cancels=0
    for day in range(1,horizon+1):
        # process billing states dtb==0? At start D, next dtb values count days until billing; day if dtb==day mod 30? easier decrement dtb daily.
        new=defaultdict(float)
        day_receipts=0; day_canc=0
        active_before=sum(st.values())
        for (g,p,age,dtb),n in st.items():
            age2=age+1; dtb2=(dtb-1)%30
            if dtb==1: # bills today at age2
                cr=churn(g,p,age2)
                survive=n*(1-cr); cancel=n-survive
                day_canc+=cancel; day_receipts+=survive*eff_price(g,p,age2)
                if survive>0: new[(g,p,age2,30)]+=survive
            else:
                new[(g,p,age2,dtb2)]+=n
        st=new; receipts+=day_receipts; cancels+=day_canc
        # costs: current planned fixed all weeks (can trim later)
        active_usage=sum(n*usage.get((g,p),0) for (g,p,age,dtb),n in st.items())
        comp=sum(n*usage.get((g,p),0)*cost_per[p] for (g,p,age,dtb),n in st.items())
        compute+=comp
        fixed=28000+200000+83000 # cap+ops+dev per day
        costs += fixed+comp+1000
    print('horizon',horizon,'cash',round(cash+receipts-costs),'receipts',round(receipts),'costs',round(costs),'compute',round(compute),'cancels',round(cancels),'subs_end',round(sum(st.values())))

import novamind_api as nm
D=nm.vars.current_day
q=lambda s:nm.query(s)['rows']
rows=q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,COUNT(DISTINCT s.customer_id) subs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN du.day>{D-7} AND du.day<={D} THEN du.usage_units ELSE 0 END) usage7,
       SUM(s.effective_price) stored_mrr,
       AVG(s.effective_price) avg_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
LEFT JOIN daily_usage du ON du.customer_id=s.customer_id AND du.day>{D-7} AND du.day<={D}
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY usage7 DESC
""")
for r in rows:
    u=r['usage7'] or 0; subs=r['subs'] or 0; m=r['stored_mrr'] or 0
    print({**r,'usage_per_sub_day': round(u/subs/7,1) if subs else None,'compute_t3_week': round(u*0.006,0),'compute_per_month': round((u/subs/7*30*0.006),2) if subs else None})
